g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does stage 1 of ConvNeXt or Swin extract?')
sendPrompt('What does stage 2 of ConvNeXt or Swin extract?')
sendPrompt('Is the bottleneck part of the backbone or custom code?')
sendPrompt('How does the custom decoder upsample and concatenate?')
sendPrompt('How does the custom decoder upsample and concatenate?')

svg.text: Backbone stages: pretrained weights loaded from torchvision / timm
Bottleneck, decoder, segmentation head: randomly initialised, trained from scratch
Forward hooks tap f1, f2 out of the backbone without modifying it
